description: A fresh Liquid Glass polish across the app with faster launch performance. AI replies now support image OCR and calendar scheduling.
features: Redesigned conversation view with Liquid Glass polish
Multi-select conversations in the sidebar for bulk actions
AI-generated replies improved for group chats, image OCR, and calendar scheduling
Contact name suggestions now enhanced with Apple suggestions
New snapshot cache restores your inbox instantly on launch
fixes: Message views now open scrolled to the latest messages
Fixed alignment issues in demo mode
title: Smarter Replies & Liquid Glass
